name: I-35 CREDIT AUTO
description_short: Buy here pay here used car dealer in Oklahoma City offering in-house financing for bad credit, no credit, SSI/disability income, and past repo customers.
description_long:
I-35 Credit Auto is a buy here pay here (BHPH) used car dealership located at 1113 SE 51st St in Oklahoma City, Oklahoma. They operate in the subprime auto financing segment, catering exclusively to buyers who are typically turned away by conventional dealerships and banks due to credit history, income type, or prior repossessions. The business self-describes as one of the best buy here pay here car lots in OKC despite not being the largest.

The dealership sells used vehicles and provides in-house financing directly to buyers. Their inventory at time of review consisted of approximately 37 used vehicles ranging from 2008 to 2020 model years, spanning brands including Chevrolet, Hyundai, Kia, Ford, Buick, Cadillac, Chrysler, GMC, Mercedes-Benz, and Mitsubishi. Prices range up to $25,995. Body types include sedans, SUVs, hatchbacks, and minivans. All financing is handled on-site; there is no third-party lender involved.

What distinguishes I-35 Credit Auto from other subprime dealers is a stated 365-day, 12,000-mile warranty included on every vehicle they finance — an uncommon offering in the BHPH space where vehicles are typically sold as-is. They explicitly accept non-traditional income sources including SSI and disability income, and they work with customers who have had prior repossessions or need a second or third household vehicle. Low down payments and low monthly payments are advertised as a differentiator from competitors. A 24/7 text line is available for initial inquiries.

This is a physical used car dealership, not a personal loan company or traditional lender. Interest rates and APR are not disclosed on their website, which is typical of BHPH operations — and rates in this segment are generally well above conventional auto loan rates. Their inventory is small (37 vehicles), aging (mostly 2011–2018), and limited to one location in southeast Oklahoma City. Buyers outside the OKC metro area cannot use this lender. The financing functions as a credit-access vehicle for borrowers who have no other options, and on-time payments may help rebuild credit depending on whether the dealer reports to credit bureaus (not specified on their site).
pros: 365-day, 12,000-mile warranty included on every financed vehicle — uncommon in the BHPH segment
Explicitly accepts SSI and disability income for financing qualification
Works with customers who have prior vehicle repossessions on their record
Offers 2nd and 3rd car financing for multi-vehicle households
Low down payments advertised as a key differentiator from other OKC special finance dealers
24/7 text line (405-299-8400) for convenient communication outside business hours
In-house financing removes bank credit check barriers entirely
cons: Interest rates and APR are not disclosed anywhere on the website — BHPH loans typically carry very high rates
Tiny inventory of 37 vehicles, mostly 2011–2018 models with limited make/model selection
Single physical location in Oklahoma City — no online-only or national service
No information on whether payments are reported to credit bureaus, limiting credit-building benefit
Vehicle prices (up to $25,995) for older, higher-mileage cars may reflect subprime financing markup
best_for: OKC-area buyers with bad or no credit history who cannot qualify at a traditional dealership
Customers whose primary income is SSI or disability payments
Buyers with a previous vehicle repossession needing to get back on the road
Households needing a second or third car where primary credit is already stretched
diagnosis: I-35 Credit Auto is best for Oklahoma City residents with severely damaged or nonexistent credit, non-traditional income (SSI/disability), or a prior repossession who need reliable transportation and have no other financing options. The main caveat is that BHPH financing carries significantly higher interest rates than conventional auto loans, and the site does not disclose APR, payment terms, or whether on-time payments are reported to credit bureaus.
services: Buy here pay here in-house auto financing
365-day / 12,000-mile vehicle warranty on all financed vehicles
